title: Pre launch Beta 2.0.0a
description:
Backup snapshot of BASE (pipeshare.live) before launch — Pre launch Beta 2.0.0a.

Includes the working Create billable package flow with Customer-folder WinCan DB3 linking for pipe chart / PACP, cloud copyOnly (source files stay on Employee), hybrid Push/apply fixes, and related PipeShare explorer work from this cycle.

Who is affected: This is a numbered platform backup you can re-apply or Push to SaaS from cPanel Releases. It does not change SaaS until you apply/push it.
changeLog: Create billable package copies to Customer and links DB3 for pipe chart.
Folder DB3 bindings save under Customer package job (Employee DB3 may stay linked).
Cloud copyOnly no longer deletes Employee source files.
Hybrid BASE→SaaS Push / PM2 / manifest-only apply path included.
